title: Wheat salad
excerpt: WHEAT INGREDIENTS 500 ml wheat Enough water to cover it 30 ml oil 1 onion finely sliced 1 red and 1 yellow pepper finely sliced 500 ml mushrooms finely sliced 1 tin sweetcorn kernels 250 ml frozen peas 100 ml butter Salt and pepper METHOD Cook the …
html:
WHEAT

INGREDIENTS

  • 500 ml wheat
  • Enough water to cover it
  • 30 ml oil
  • 1 onion finely sliced
  • 1 red and 1 yellow pepper finely sliced
  • 500 ml mushrooms finely sliced
  • 1 tin sweetcorn kernels
  • 250 ml frozen peas
  • 100 ml butter
  • Salt and pepper

METHOD

  1. Cook the wheat soft in water with a pinch of salt. This takes about 30 minutes. Drain it. Stir in the butter immediately.
  2. Fry the onions in oil until glassy. Now fry the peppers until just soft. Now fry the mushrooms until just soft. Mix it all into the wheat.
  3. Now stir the sweetcorn kernels and peas through the wheat.
